nasb.text: and have put on the new self who is being renewed to a true knowledge according to the image of the One who created him—

esv.text: and have put on the new self, which is being renewed in knowledge after the image of its creator.

cnv.text: 穿上了新人。這新人照著他的創造者的形象漸漸更新，能夠充分認識主。

ccb.text: 穿上了新人。这新人在知识上不断更新，更像他的造物主。

csbs.text: 并且穿上了新人。这新人照着创造他那一位的形像不断地被更新，以致真正认识他。
